data.title: Expert Warns CLARITY Crypto Bill Faces Challenges Amid Political Shifts
data.description: John E. Deaton has expressed concerns regarding the future of the CLARITY crypto market structure bill. According to NS3.AI, Deaton highlighted that if Congress does not take action before the summer, the bill might face significant hurdles. He noted that a Democratic victory in both the House and the Senate could position Senator Elizabeth Warren to chair the Senate Banking Committee, potentially making it difficult for the bill to pass.

data.title: AI TRENDS | ZetaChain Integrates Alibaba's Qwen 3.6-Plus into Anuma AI Layer
data.description: ZetaChain has integrated Alibaba's Qwen 3.6-Plus into its Anuma AI layer, enhancing its capabilities with a model that features a one million-token context window. According to NS3.AI, OpenRouter highlights Qwen 3.6-Plus as the largest AI model in China and the global leader in terms of token count.

data.title: US media: US-Iran mediators make final efforts to secure a 45-day ceasefire.
data.description: Four sources familiar with the negotiations from the United States, Israel, and the region revealed that the U.S., Iran, and a group of regional mediators are discussing the terms of a potential 45-day ceasefire agreement that could ultimately end the war. The sources said the chances of reaching a partial agreement within the next 48 hours are slim, but this last-ditch effort is the only chance to prevent a sharp escalation of the war. President Trump's 10-day deadline for Iran was originally set to expire Monday evening. However, Trump extended the deadline by 20 hours on Sunday and posted a new deadline on his social media platform, "Truth Social": 8 p.m. Eastern Time on Tuesday. Trump told AXIOS on Sunday that the U.S. is engaged in "deep negotiations" with Iran and that an agreement is possible before his deadline expires on Tuesday. (AXIOS)

data.title: Trader Sells Significant Amounts of ETH and AAVE
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on April 6, Lookonchain reported that trader @thomasg_eth sold 11,409 ETH, valued at $23.47 million, two hours ago. Additionally, the trader sold 13,150 AAVE, worth $1.21 million.

data.title: New Wallet Initiates High-Leverage ETH Short Position on Hyperliquid
data.description: A newly created wallet address has deposited 3.98 million USDC into Hyperliquid, according to BlockBeats. Within the last two hours, the wallet opened a short position on 9,526 ETH using 20x leverage, with a nominal value of approximately $20.25 million. The position is currently experiencing an unrealized loss of around $255,000.

data.title: KB Financial Group to Strengthen Partnership with Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire
data.description: KB Financial Group is set to meet with Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire to enhance their collaborative efforts. According to NS3.AI, the partnership between the two companies began in June 2025, focusing on the use of USDC in South Korea, developing international payment solutions, and exploring the creation of a stablecoin based on the Korean won.

data.title: Bank of Japan Rate Hike Probability Rises to 70% for April Meeting
data.description: Markets are currently anticipating a significant likelihood of a rate hike by the Bank of Japan at its upcoming April meeting. According to NS3.AI, Tomohisa Fujiki of Citi Research has indicated that there is up to a 70% probability of this monetary policy adjustment. The anticipation has led to a rise in the 10-year Japanese government bond yield, which increased by 2 basis points to reach 2.400%, marking its highest intraday level since February 1999.

data.title: Circle's USDC Freeze Power Faces Allegations of Inconsistency
data.description: On-chain investigator ZachXBT has raised concerns about Circle's application of its USDC freeze power, alleging inconsistency in its actions. According to NS3.AI, ZachXBT highlighted 15 cases since 2022 involving over $420 million in allegedly illicit funds. Additionally, he referenced a sealed U.S. civil matter where 16 operational business wallets were blocked, with Circle subsequently unfreezing at least one wallet associated with Goated.com.

data.title: Tensions Escalate Between U.S. and Iran Over Infrastructure Threats
data.description: According to Odaily, analysts from Al Jazeera indicate that recent statements from U.S. President Donald Trump suggest no progress in negotiations or efforts to bridge the gap between Iran and the United States. In light of recent messages from Iran's Revolutionary Guard, which warned of equal retaliation against any attacks on civilian infrastructure, the situation has reached a critical juncture. Trump has threatened to destroy Iran's bridges and power plants, while Iran has vowed to retaliate in kind, targeting civilian infrastructure in the Gulf region and Israel.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Finds Short-Term Stability Amid Challenging Macro Environment
data.description: Gold prices have stabilized after a significant sell-off, finding a short-term foothold as positions are reset. According to Jin10, despite this stabilization, the macroeconomic backdrop remains challenging for the precious metal. The recent market dynamics have led to a recalibration of positions, providing some support to gold prices. However, broader economic factors continue to pose challenges, impacting the outlook for gold in the near term.

data.title: The dYdX community voted to approve the proposal to "gradually close 12 markets".
data.description: The dYdX community voted to approve the proposal to "gradually close 12 markets" with a 91.07% approval rate. The proposal includes the gradual closure of the following 12 trading markets: JASMY-USD, KOMA-USD, LINEA-USD, ME-USD, NEIRO-USD, PIPPIN-USD, RAY-USD, TRB-USD, TRY-USD, USDE-USD, YFI-USD, and ZEREBRO-USD.

data.title: Iran Threatens to Block Mandeb Strait Amid Tensions with U.S.
data.description: Ali Akbar Velayati has issued a warning that the Iran-led resistance front might consider blocking the Mandeb Strait if the United States 'makes another mistake.' According to NS3.AI, Velayati expressed on social media that such an action could significantly disrupt global energy and trade flows.

data.title: Solana's Quantum-Resistant Tests Impact Transaction Speeds
data.description: Solana's recent tests of quantum-resistant signatures have significantly reduced transaction processing speeds by approximately 90%, underscoring a notable trade-off between enhanced security and operational performance. According to NS3.AI, these tests are being conducted by the Solana Foundation in collaboration with Project Eleven. In response to the findings, Solana is now considering implementing protections for individual wallets rather than pursuing a comprehensive network-wide update.

data.title: Precious metals continued to weaken, while crude oil fluctuated and diverged at high levels.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices fell to $4,630.46 per ounce, a daily decrease of 0.97%. Silver prices fell to $72.055 per ounce, a daily decrease of 1.22%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 48.62, a daily increase of 3.40%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 69.81, a daily decrease of 0.73%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate rose 0.03% to 6.88562. The USD/JPY exchange rate rose 0.03% to 159.654. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 fell 0.53% to 5,701.13 points; the UK FTSE 100 rose 0.30% to 10,452.09 points; and the German DAX 40 fell 0.46% to 23,209.90 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil fell 0.08% to $112.19 per barrel, while Brent crude oil rose 1.15% to $113.85 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Planet Morning News
data.description: 1. An advisor to Iran's Supreme Leader warned the US that it might close the Bab el-Mandeb Strait as a countermeasure; 2. A whale deposited 31 million STO tokens into Binance and Bitget, making a profit of $1.37 million; 3. A newly created address deposited 3.98 million USDC into Hyperliquid and shorted $20.25 million worth of ETH; 4. The yield on 10-year Japanese government bonds reached a new high since 1999; 5. Arthur Hayes: Bitcoin may fall below $60,000 before rising to $250,000; 6. A cryptocurrency lawyer said the Drift incident may constitute "civil negligence"; 7. Iran's Permanent Mission to the United Nations: Trump is attempting to drag the Middle East into endless wars; 8. Bahrain called on the UN to pass a resolution to open the Strait of Hormuz by force; 9. Trump issued another "ultimatum," causing oil prices to rise.

data.title: Significant Token Unlocks Scheduled for Aptos, Babylon, and Linea
data.description:
This week, several cryptocurrencies are set for substantial token unlocks, releasing a total value exceeding $10 million. According to Foresight News, data from Token Unlocks indicates that Aptos (APT), Babylon (BABY), and Linea (LINEA) are among the tokens involved.

Aptos will unlock 11.31 million tokens on April 12, valued at approximately $9.65 million, representing 0.68% of its circulating supply. Babylon is scheduled to unlock 612 million tokens on April 10, with a value of around $7.56 million, accounting for 37.77% of its circulating supply. Linea will also unlock 1.38 billion tokens on April 10, valued at about $4.68 million, making up 5.32% of its circulating supply.

Additionally, RedStone (RED) will unlock 40.85 million tokens on April 6, valued at approximately $4.25 million, which constitutes 13.89% of its circulating supply.

data.title: Middle East Conflict Impacts Global Supply Chains, Huatai Securities Reports
data.description: On April 6, Jin10 reported that Huatai Securities released a research note indicating that the ongoing Middle East conflict has surpassed the scope of a temporary shock, causing significant disruptions in capital and supply chains across various sectors. According to Jin10, even if clarity emerges in the future, the investment strategies post-April will differ from those during the spring volatility period. The report highlights that the strength of the U.S. dollar and oil prices has exceeded expectations this year, while global liquidity remains tighter than anticipated, resulting in limited room for valuation increases. The market may shift from reacting to news statements to focusing more on fundamentals, with increased attention on material shortages, supply chain issues, and cash flow risks. Huatai Securities advises maintaining a cautious approach towards volatility.

data.title: An advisor to Iran's Supreme Leader warned the United States that it might close the Bab el-Mandeb Strait as a countermeasure.
data.description: Iran's Supreme Leader's foreign affairs advisor, Ayatollah Velayati, warned the United States on the 5th that if it "makes another mistake," the Iranian-led resistance front will retaliate by blocking the Bab el-Mandeb Strait. Velayati posted on social media that day: "Today, the unified command of the resistance front views the Bab el-Mandeb Strait as much as the Strait of Hormuz. If the White House makes another foolish mistake, it will soon realize that with just one move, global energy and trade flows will be disrupted." (Xinhua)

data.title: IMF Warns of Rapid Crisis Potential in Tokenized Finance
data.description:
The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has issued a warning regarding the potential for crises in tokenized finance to develop more swiftly than central banks can manage. According to NS3.AI, the market capitalization of stablecoins is approaching $300 billion, raising concerns about the speed at which financial disruptions could occur. Tobias Adrian from the IMF highlighted that traditional financial systems have settlement delays that allow central banks time to intervene during crises. However, tokenized systems inherently lack this buffer, potentially accelerating the onset of financial instability.

The IMF report also introduced a five-pillar policy roadmap aimed at addressing these challenges. This comes as major U.S. market infrastructure groups are increasingly focusing on expanding their efforts in tokenized securities, signaling a significant shift in the financial landscape.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Nears 70,000 ETH Staking Goal
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation has significantly increased its staking activities, adding over 45,000 ETH on Friday. According to NS3.AI, this brings the foundation's total staked amount to approximately 69,500 ETH, just shy of its 70,000 ETH target. Arkham Intelligence reported that the recent staking batch was valued at over $92.2 million, with the foundation now having locked more than $143 million in the Ethereum Beacon Deposit Contract. The Ethereum Foundation stated that the staking yield will be used to support protocol research, development, and ecosystem grants as part of its treasury policy.
